title: Vendor in latest content from github.com/containers and opencontainers
body:
Update opencontainers/selinux to fix potential race condition when relabeling.
Update containers/image to pull in some debugging improvements and small potential
bugs
Update containers/libpod to fix small potential bugs.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@giuseppe @umohnani8 @TomSweeneyRedHat @vrothberg @nalind @pixdrift PTAL

Want to vendor in latest code before we cut 1.5 release.
LGTM, as  you noted we'll want to get #118 too.

:pushpin: Commit a4abe47 has been approved by `giuseppe`
